name: Update the URL for Pages / Products

[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Update the URL for Webstore Pages"}], "data-id": "update-the-url-for-webstore-pages"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto lets you customise the URL for any content page, product or product category:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select either "}, {"text": "Web Page", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Product Category", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click into the page you wish to edit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Naming", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and untick "}, {"text": "Automatic URL", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the custom URL you wish to use."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gnc0pMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gnc0pMAB.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2024-09-25 at 11.34.41 am.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you intend on changing your homepage URL, ensure the custom URL is blank.
